description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a highly distorted and elongated body and limbs, giving it an unnatural, stretched appearance. The head is proportionally small and human-like, with facial features visible, while the torso and arms are extremely extended horizontally, resembling wings or outstretched arms. The clothing appears to be a single-piece garment that drapes down in a triangular fashion, merging with the elongated lower body. The figure's posture is upright, but the proportions are exaggerated, making the arms and lower body much longer than typical human anatomy. The surface texture is smooth, with visible shading and some subtle folds in the clothing. The overall form is stylized and abstract, rather than realistic.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with an elongated, stretched body and arms, upright posture, and smooth, draped clothing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and the extreme horizontal stretch of the arms and garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head and the dramatic extension of the arm and garment to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and the symmetrical extension of the arms and garment, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the profile of the head and the elongated right arm and garment extension.
attribute_clothing_type: long draped garment with fitted upper section and extended sleeves
